author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v5.2.3
body: ## [5.2.3](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v5.2.2...v5.2.3) (2018-08-16) ### Bug Fixes * Allow object as type for Root (closes [algolia/react-instantsearch#1446](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1446)) ([#1461](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1461)) ([62e6a50](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/62e6a50)) * **List:** render children list only when required ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1472](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1472)) ([c567b46](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/c567b46)), closes [#1459](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1459)
